---
title: "Carolina Byl"
about: # More info about this page type: https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles # Options include: jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  image: profile_pic.jpg
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/carolina-byl/"
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/cdbyl"
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      url: "mailto:carolinabyl@gmail.com"
    - text: CV (english)
      icon: file-pdf
      url: "https://github.com/cdbyl/portfolio/blob/main/CV_en.pdf?raw=true"
comments: false
---

::: column-page
## About me
GIS Analyst and Environmental Engineer with 4+ years of experience delivering spatial analysis, cartographic products, and cloud-based geospatial solutions for environmental and infrastructure projects. Proven background in enterprise geodatabases, remote sensing analysis using Google Earth Engine, and field data collection workflows. Programming experience in Python, SQL, and JavaScript, applied to support multidisciplinary teams in national and international contexts, including technical instruction and mentoring.

## Education

BS & MS in Environmental Engineering @ [Universidad Nacional de San Martín (UNSAM)](https://unsam.edu.ar/escuelas/ecyt/171/ciencia/ingenieria-ambiental)

Diploma in Applied Geomatics @ [Instituto de Altos Estudios Espaciales Mario Gulich (CONAE - UNC)](https://ig.conae.unc.edu.ar/diplomatura-universitaria-en-geomatica-aplicada/)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

[comment]: <> ( Selected Projects )

[comment]: <> ([likert](https://github.com/jbryer/likert) - Analysis and Visualization of Likert Based Items)

:::
